title: Linking a Board to a task
excerpt:
Hi. 
I have a board of projects. Each project has its own board with more granular tasks, owners, status etc. 
How can i click on a particular project in the main board and have it open/go the detailed project board 
Hel…

posts.author: sanjay (sanjay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I have a board of projects. Each project has its own board with more granular tasks, owners, status etc.

How can i click on a particular project in the main board and have it open/go the detailed project board

Help is much needed as this is a requirement of the product for us

Sanjay

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
One possibility is to open the detailed project board in a new tab (right mouse click on board in board list). After the board is opened in a new tab copy the URL from your browser address bar.

Go tho your board where all projects are listed and a Link column, paste the URL in the row listing that project in the newly created column. This will give you a hyperlink into the detailed project board.

posts.author: fredlierman (Fred Lierman)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be very useful.
It’s true you can add a URL to the board in a link column, but this is very inelegant and it seems to open the board in a new tab as well. It would be nice to at least have the option to open the link in the same tab.
